channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: The Avalanches teamed up with the Yeah Yeah Yeahs' Karen O o…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: The Avalanches teamed up with the Yeah Yeah Yeahs' Karen O on the laid-back, mysterious new single "Blue Shadows"
item.content:encoded: The Avalanches teamed up with the Yeah Yeah Yeahs' Karen O on the laid-back, mysterious new single "Blue Shadows"

item.title: The online outcry over the renaming of a summer festival ill…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The online outcry over the renaming of a summer festival illustrates the unease over the data center boom in the South. n.pr/4vIhF16
item.content:encoded: The online outcry over the renaming of a summer festival illustrates the unease over the data center boom in the South. n.pr/4vIhF16

item.description: RIP Magic's latest single is the muggy, claustrophobic "Fight Over There"
item.content:encoded: RIP Magic's latest single is the muggy, claustrophobic "Fight Over There"

item.title: Hear Nicole Atkins' big, powerful '80s-style synth-rock affi…

item.title: Ineffekt's propulsive new single “OPTION” will help power yo…

item.description: Ineffekt's propulsive new single “OPTION” will help power you through the rest of the week

item.title: To get slightly ahead of the virus, health officials need to…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: To get slightly ahead of the virus, health officials need to quickly identify people at risk of infection, a practice known as contact tracing. That's a challenge in the Democratic Republic of Congo. n.pr/4x3HuKd
item.content:encoded: To get slightly ahead of the virus, health officials need to quickly identify people at risk of infection, a practice known as contact tracing. That's a challenge in the Democratic Republic of Congo. n.pr/4x3HuKd

item.description: Check out Emma Ruth Rundle's swirling, atmospheric, slow-building new song "Enough"
item.content:encoded: Check out Emma Ruth Rundle's swirling, atmospheric, slow-building new song "Enough"

item.title: Album of the Day: Left to Die, “Initium Mortis." Joined by m…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Album of the Day: Left to Die, “Initium Mortis." Joined by members of Gruesome, Florida death metal pioneers Death reincarnate with a vengeance.
item.content:encoded: Album of the Day: Left to Die, “Initium Mortis." Joined by members of Gruesome, Florida death metal pioneers Death reincarnate with a vengeance.

item.title: The U.S. has signed a nuclear cooperation agreement with Sau…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The U.S. has signed a nuclear cooperation agreement with Saudi Arabia. And, the independent autopsy results of Nolan Wells fuel more questions surrounding his cause of death. n.pr/4pzBCFP
item.content:encoded: The U.S. has signed a nuclear cooperation agreement with Saudi Arabia. And, the independent autopsy results of Nolan Wells fuel more questions surrounding his cause of death. n.pr/4pzBCFP

item.title: "You guys are ordering by act of Congress that everyone has …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: "You guys are ordering by act of Congress that everyone has to wear diapers before they get in, is that what we've come to?"
item.content:encoded: "You guys are ordering by act of Congress that everyone has to wear diapers before they get in, is that what we've come to?"

item.title: The former special counsel led two criminal investigations o…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The former special counsel led two criminal investigations of President Trump and has been a frequent target of Trump's ire on social media. n.pr/4fq0ICs
item.content:encoded: The former special counsel led two criminal investigations of President Trump and has been a frequent target of Trump's ire on social media. n.pr/4fq0ICs

item.title: Transportation officials have removed a growing list of safe…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Transportation officials have removed a growing list of safety materials that mention bike lanes from federal websites. Safety advocates warn that's undermining proven measures for reducing crashes. n.pr/4fqMx1n
item.content:encoded: Transportation officials have removed a growing list of safety materials that mention bike lanes from federal websites. Safety advocates warn that's undermining proven measures for reducing crashes. n.pr/4fqMx1n

item.title: Rolling Stone Reports, only on @AppleNews: The Rise and Fall…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Rolling Stone Reports, only on @AppleNews: The Rise and Fall of the QAnon Queen of Canada

Romana Didulo became one of North America’s most dangerous conspiracy figures, whose followers believed she could erase debt and cure cancer. When the government raided her compound, it was almost too late.
item.content:encoded:
Rolling Stone Reports, only on @AppleNews: The Rise and Fall of the QAnon Queen of Canada

Romana Didulo became one of North America’s most dangerous conspiracy figures, whose followers believed she could erase debt and cure cancer. When the government raided her compound, it was almost too late.

item.title: 'Dancing Alone On The Concrete,’ Stef Chura’s first album in…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
'Dancing Alone On The Concrete,’ Stef Chura’s first album in seven years, features members of @remhq.bsky.social, @sugarcopperblue.bsky.social, and Elephant 6.

Hear "Danny," its lead single with Peter Buck and Mike Mills:
item.content:encoded:
'Dancing Alone On The Concrete,’ Stef Chura’s first album in seven years, features members of @remhq.bsky.social, @sugarcopperblue.bsky.social, and Elephant 6.

Hear "Danny," its lead single with Peter Buck and Mike Mills:

item.title: Clubs, live music venues and pubs in England are set for a 2…
item.author: DJ Mag (@djmag.com)
item.description:
Clubs, live music venues and pubs in England are set for a 20% cut in business tax rates as part of a new government package aimed at supporting high streets 📊

djmag.com/news/busines...
item.content:encoded:
Clubs, live music venues and pubs in England are set for a 20% cut in business tax rates as part of a new government package aimed at supporting high streets 📊

item.title: Congo's Ebola outbreak has crossed the grim 1,000-death thre…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Congo's Ebola outbreak has crossed the grim 1,000-death threshold, marking the fastest fatal surge in recorded history of the virus. n.pr/4pKpy4H
item.content:encoded: Congo's Ebola outbreak has crossed the grim 1,000-death threshold, marking the fastest fatal surge in recorded history of the virus. n.pr/4pKpy4H

item.title: Grace Farris' book brings readers behind the med school scen…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Grace Farris' book brings readers behind the med school scenes — documenting anxiety over loans, bouts of impostor syndrome, friendships forged in stress, and the ever-impossible work-life balance. n.pr/4fRi7VS
item.content:encoded: Grace Farris' book brings readers behind the med school scenes — documenting anxiety over loans, bouts of impostor syndrome, friendships forged in stress, and the ever-impossible work-life balance. n.pr/4fRi7VS

item.title: A federal judge will sentence Vance Boelter in the killings …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A federal judge will sentence Vance Boelter in the killings of Melissa and Mark Hortman, and the attacks on John Hoffman, his wife Yvette and their daughter Hope. Boelter will likely receive a term of two life sentences plus 40 years (via MPR News).
item.content:encoded: A federal judge will sentence Vance Boelter in the killings of Melissa and Mark Hortman, and the attacks on John Hoffman, his wife Yvette and their daughter Hope. Boelter will likely receive a term of two life sentences plus 40 years (via MPR News).

item.title: The nuclear power deal between the U.S. and Saudi Arabia was…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The nuclear power deal between the U.S. and Saudi Arabia was met with alarm in Israel as it deepened concerns that Israel, a major American ally, and Trump are increasingly diverging on foreign policy and security. n.pr/4fPDEOL
item.content:encoded: The nuclear power deal between the U.S. and Saudi Arabia was met with alarm in Israel as it deepened concerns that Israel, a major American ally, and Trump are increasingly diverging on foreign policy and security. n.pr/4fPDEOL

YUNHO (ATEEZ) × HAYATO (ONE N' ONLY)

item.title: Based on Marissa Stapley's 2021 crime novel, Lucky is an agg…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Based on Marissa Stapley's 2021 crime novel, Lucky is an aggressively entertaining series about a con woman who absconds with millions of dollars — then must evade the mob and the law. n.pr/4wmlaLQ
item.content:encoded: Based on Marissa Stapley's 2021 crime novel, Lucky is an aggressively entertaining series about a con woman who absconds with millions of dollars — then must evade the mob and the law. n.pr/4wmlaLQ
